companies.name: Steinbeis Embedded Systems Technologies GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Steinbeis Embedded Systems Technologies GmbH. Steinbeis Embedded Systems Technologies GmbH is a Embedded Software Products company. Steinbeis Embedded Systems Technologies GmbH is a company in the Steinbeis-verbund that offers a wide range of engineering services, including support for requirements definition, design of hard and software, and production of series-based prototyping and small series. They are a flexible and reliable partner for industrial companies, primarily in the field of automation technology. Steinbeis Embedded Systems Technologies GmbH employs 10 people (+14.3% YoY, +2 people), founded in 2012. Headquartered in Germany.
[...]
Steinbeis Embedded Systems Technologies GmbH (Steinbeis EST), part of the Steinbeis Network, offers a wide range of engineering services. Our expertise spans from requirement definition support to the design of hardware and software, and the production of prototypes and small batches, including testing and qualification. With extensive experience in electronics and software development, Steinbeis EST positions itself as a flexible and reliable partner for industrial companies, primarily in automation technology.
[...]

- Founded Year: 2012

companies.name: de Jonge GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
de Jonge GmbH. de Jonge GmbH is a Embedded Software Products company. De Jonge GmbH employs 2 people, founded in 2024. Headquartered in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany.
[...]
de Jonge GmbH develops energy-efficient embedded AI solutions for industrial systems. The goal is to make AI available exactly where data is generated: in machines, sensors, and existing equipment. 

At the core is an inline approach: with EdgeBrain, a plug-and-play AI module, AI can be integrated between sensor and host without cloud dependency and without changes to existing IT/OT architectures. This enables inspection, monitoring, and decision processes to run deterministically, fast, and energy-efficiently directly at the system - from quality inspection to sensor fusion and condition monitoring. 

Customers benefit from AI that delivers strong performance at low power, integrates seamlessly into real production environments, and keeps its decisions transparent and traceable. Optionally, EdgeBrain supports bidirectional post-quantum-secure encryption for especially secure local or hybrid setups. 

And in the end, it’s exactly this ambition that drives us: precision, craftsmanship, and attention to detail - engineered in Nuremberg, with a hint of Dürer.
[...]
- Industry: Embedded Software Products
- Type: Public Company
- Headquarters: Nuremberg, Germany
- Founded Year: 2024
